Buy Box

What we buy.

If it's distressed and it's in the Triangle, we want to see it.

SFR & Townhomes
Single family homes and attached townhomes. Residential only.
Any Price Point
Starter homes to high-end renovations. We underwrite everything.
Any Condition
Full gut to light cosmetic. Hoarders, estates, foreclosures. We've seen worse.
Within 45 Min of Raleigh
Triangle area and surrounding markets. Durham, Chapel Hill, Cary, Wake Forest, Apex.

How It Works

Four steps.
That's it.

1
Text Audrey
Address. Condition. What the seller needs. That's all she needs to get started.
2
Same-Day Offer
Soft offer the same day. No waiting. No committees. No runaround.
3
We Close
7 days if they need it. 60 days if they need time. 100% guaranteed. We don't back out.
4
You List It
We renovate. We call you. You show up to a clean, staged, renovated house. You sell it. You collect both checks.

One phone call. Two commissions. Zero extra marketing.

Text Audrey
Right Now.

Your name. That's all she needs.
